criteria.name: Two co-existing Rhino route groups: multi-tenant for staff (/api/:organization/) and single-tenant for customers (/api/customer/)
subtasks: Configure route groups in config/routes.rb
Configure ResolveOrganizationFromRoute middleware in config/initializers/rhino.rb

criteria.name: Staff can create and manage services with a status field (active / draft / inactive). Only active services are visible to customers.
subtasks: Create services blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/services.yaml
Verify Service model validations and status enum in app/models/service.rb

criteria.name: Organizations manage their staff roster. Staff members are org-scoped and not visible on the customer route.
subtasks: Create staff_members blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/staff_members.yaml
Verify StaffMember model validations in app/models/staff_member.rb

criteria.name: Staff create available time slots linked to a service and optionally a staff member. Slots have an available boolean. Only available slots are visible to customers.
subtasks: Create time_slots blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/time_slots.yaml
Verify TimeSlot model validations in app/models/time_slot.rb

criteria.name: Customers browse active services and available time slots, then create bookings referencing a time slot. A booking marks the slot as unavailable.
subtasks: Create bookings blueprint in .agentcode/blueprints/bookings.yaml
Add after_create callback in app/models/booking.rb to mark the associated TimeSlot as unavailable

criteria.name: Bookings progress through states (pending -> confirmed -> completed -> cancelled). Staff can update any booking status. Customers can only cancel their own pending bookings.
subtasks: Add status validation and state transition checks in app/models/booking.rb
Implement custom update policy in app/policies/booking_policy.rb to restrict customer updates to cancelling pending bookings

criteria.name: The organization route enforces organization_id scoping on all owned models. Org A staff cannot see, update, or delete Org B's resources (returns 404 not 403).
subtasks: Verify rhino_owner :organization is set on Service, StaffMember, TimeSlot, and Booking models
Write cross-tenant isolation tests in test/models/cross_tenant_isolation_test.rb

criteria.name: The customer route enforces current_user scoping on bookings. Customer A cannot see, update, or delete Customer B's bookings (returns 404).
subtasks: Implement BookingScope in app/models/scopes/booking_scope.rb to filter by current_user.id on customer route
Write cross-user isolation tests in test/models/cross_user_isolation_test.rb

criteria.name: Customers never see draft or inactive services; customers never see unavailable time slots.
subtasks: Implement ServiceScope in app/models/scopes/service_scope.rb to filter to status: active on customer route
Implement TimeSlotScope in app/models/scopes/time_slot_scope.rb to filter to available: true on customer route

criteria.name: Customers see only active services and available slots from their organization.
subtasks: Verify ServiceScope and TimeSlotScope correctly filter by organization context on customer route
Write catalog visibility tests in test/models/catalog_visibility_test.rb

criteria.name: Customers cannot create, update, or delete services, staff members, or time slots.
subtasks: Verify customer role permissions in services.yaml, staff_members.yaml, and time_slots.yaml blueprints
Write write protection tests in test/policies/write_protection_test.rb

criteria.name: Cross-org index returns 200 with empty or filtered list, never 404.
subtasks: Verify index actions return empty array or filtered list instead of raising RecordNotFound
Write index exclusion tests in test/controllers/index_exclusion_test.rb

criteria.name: All routes return 401 without a valid token.
subtasks: Verify authenticate_user! or equivalent auth guard is active on all API routes
Write unauthenticated access tests in test/controllers/unauthenticated_access_test.rb

criteria.name: Seed the specified users, organizations, roles, and sample data.
subtasks: Implement db/seeds.rb to create ClipMaster, HealWell, and the specified admin, staff, and customer users with correct roles

criteria.name: The time_slots table has organization_id and is properly scoped to ensure robust multi-tenant isolation.
criteria.user_story: Gap compensation: Time Slot Organization ID (DATA_MODEL_UX_MISMATCH)
subtasks: Add organization_id to time_slots blueprint and migration
Verify TimeSlot belongs_to :organization and has rhino_owner :organization
